verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I believe it's perfectly clear the end is drawing near our bridegroom is very soon to come I believe this evening light is gonna take me through the night till the time that we'll be called on home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: lest my heart should yearn for the darkness from this light I walk away lest I ever try this perfect truth deny save me from my erring ways restore me to the faith I pray

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've seen many come to know this truth that I love so but with time their faces just can't be found This Faith give way a doubting end they just could not stand and it seems they've turned this Gospel down

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: lest my heart should yearn for the darkness from this light I walk away lest I ever try this perfect truth deny save me from my erring ways restore me to the faith I pray

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I just want to be prepared and not to be snared by the enemies deceiving scheme till the day he calls for me let me faithful be no matter how hard my way seems

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: lest my heart should yearn for the darkness from this light I walk away lest I ever try this perfect truth deny save me from my erring ways restore me to the faith I pray
